metadata.description: Batch 12 of 50 — Oxford 3000 words 1101-1200; lexical fields reviewed

words.definitionEn: the number 4 in an ordered series
words.example: She finished fourth in the race.

words.definitionEn: a structure surrounding something; to put something in a frame
words.definitionTh: กรอบ / ใส่กรอบ
words.example: The photograph has a wooden frame.

words.definitionEn: not controlled, occupied, or costing money; to release
words.definitionTh: อิสระ / ฟรี / ปล่อย
words.example: The software is free to use.

words.definitionEn: the right or ability to do what you choose
words.example: Everyone values freedom of choice.

words.definitionEn: to become hard because of cold or to make very cold
words.definitionTh: แข็งตัว / แช่แข็ง
words.example: Water freezes at zero degrees Celsius.

words.definitionEn: the rate at which something happens
words.example: We increased the inspection frequency.

words.definitionEn: often
words.example: The filter should be checked frequently.

words.definitionEn: new, recently made, or not preserved
words.example: Use fresh ingredients for the product.

words.definitionEn: the day after Thursday and before Saturday
words.example: The meeting is on Friday.

words.definitionEn: a machine that keeps food cold
words.example: Keep the sample in the fridge.

words.definitionEn: a person you know and like
words.example: She met a friend after work.

words.definitionEn: kind and pleasant
words.example: The staff were friendly and helpful.

words.definitionEn: a relationship between friends
words.example: Their friendship lasted for many years.

words.definitionEn: to make someone afraid
words.example: The loud alarm frightened the child.

words.definitionEn: feeling afraid
words.example: She was frightened by the sudden noise.

words.definitionEn: making someone feel afraid
words.example: It was a frightening experience.

words.definitionEn: a small animal that lives on land and in water
words.example: A frog jumped into the pond.

words.definitionEn: used to show the starting point, origin, or source
words.example: The train travels from Bangkok to Pattaya.

words.definitionEn: the part that faces forward
words.example: Wait at the front entrance.

words.definitionEn: kept at a very low temperature or turned to ice
words.example: Store the frozen product below minus eighteen degrees.

words.definitionEn: the part of a plant containing seeds and often eaten
words.example: Fresh fruit is available in the canteen.

words.definitionEn: to cook food in hot oil or fat
words.example: Fry the onions for two minutes.

words.definitionEn: a substance used to produce heat or power
words.definitionTh: เชื้อเพลิง
words.example: The generator needs more fuel.

words.definitionEn: containing as much as possible
words.example: The storage tank is full.

words.definitionEn: completely
words.definitionTh: อย่างเต็มที่
words.example: The machine is fully automatic.

words.definitionEn: enjoyment or something enjoyable
words.definitionTh: ความสนุก / สนุก
words.example: The training activity was fun.

words.definitionEn: the purpose of something; to work correctly
words.definitionTh: หน้าที่ / ทำงาน
words.example: The sensor functions correctly.

words.definitionEn: money saved for a purpose; to provide money
words.definitionTh: กองทุน / สนับสนุนเงิน
words.example: The company funded the improvement project.

words.definitionEn: basic and very important
words.definitionTh: พื้นฐานและสำคัญ
words.example: Safety is a fundamental requirement.

words.definitionEn: money provided for a purpose
words.example: The project received additional funding.

words.definitionEn: making you laugh or seeming strange
words.example: He told a funny story.

words.definitionEn: the thick soft hair covering some animals
words.example: The animal has thick fur.

words.definitionEn: large movable objects such as tables and chairs
words.definitionTh: เฟอร์นิเจอร์
words.example: The office needs new furniture.

words.definitionEn: additional or to a greater distance or degree
words.definitionTh: เพิ่มเติม / ไกลออกไป
words.example: Further testing is required.

words.definitionEn: the time after the present
words.example: We are planning future improvements.

words.definitionEn: to obtain or increase; an improvement or benefit
words.definitionTh: ได้รับ / ผลประโยชน์
words.example: The team gained valuable experience.

words.definitionEn: a place where art is displayed
words.example: The photographs are displayed in the gallery.

words.definitionEn: an activity played for enjoyment or competition
words.definitionTh: เกม / การแข่งขัน
words.example: They played a card game after dinner.

words.definitionEn: an empty space or difference between things
words.example: There is a small gap between the parts.

words.definitionEn: a building where vehicles are kept or repaired
words.definitionTh: โรงรถ / อู่ซ่อมรถ
words.example: The car is parked in the garage.

words.definitionEn: an area where plants are grown
words.example: They grow vegetables in the garden.

words.definitionEn: a substance like air that is not solid or liquid
words.example: The sensor detected a gas leak.

words.definitionEn: a movable barrier in a fence or entrance
words.example: Meet me at the factory gate.

words.definitionEn: to collect things or come together
words.definitionTh: รวบรวม / รวมตัว
words.example: We gathered data from three lines.

words.definitionEn: affecting most people or things; not specific
words.example: This is a general safety rule.

words.definitionEn: usually or in most cases
words.example: The system is generally reliable.

words.definitionEn: to produce or create something
words.definitionTh: สร้าง / ผลิต
words.example: The report generates useful insights.

words.definitionEn: a group born at a similar time or the production of something
words.definitionTh: รุ่น / การผลิต
words.example: The new generation of cameras is faster.

words.definitionEn: willing to give more than expected
words.example: She made a generous donation.

words.definitionEn: a particular type of art, music, or literature
words.definitionTh: ประเภทงานศิลปะ
words.example: Science fiction is a popular genre.

words.definitionEn: kind, calm, or not strong
words.definitionTh: อ่อนโยน / เบา
words.example: Use gentle pressure on the sensor.

words.definitionEn: a polite man
words.definitionTh: สุภาพบุรุษ
words.example: A gentleman held the door open.

words.definitionEn: the study of places and the Earth's surface
words.definitionTh: ภูมิศาสตร์
words.example: She studies geography at school.

words.definitionEn: to obtain, receive, become, or arrive
words.definitionTh: ได้รับ / กลายเป็น
words.example: We need to get more information.

words.definitionEn: the spirit of a dead person
words.example: The children told a story about a ghost.

words.definitionEn: extremely large; a very large person or organization
words.definitionTh: ยักษ์ / ใหญ่มาก
words.example: A giant screen displays the results.

words.definitionEn: something given to someone without payment
words.example: She received a birthday gift.

words.definitionEn: a female child or young woman
words.definitionTh: เด็กผู้หญิง
words.example: The girl is reading a book.

words.definitionEn: a female romantic partner
words.example: He introduced his girlfriend to his family.

words.definitionEn: to provide or hand something to someone
words.example: Please give me the report.

words.definitionEn: pleased and happy
words.example: I am glad the test was successful.

words.definitionEn: a hard transparent material or a container made from it
words.definitionTh: แก้ว / กระจก
words.example: The window is made of glass.

words.definitionEn: relating to the whole world
words.example: The company operates in a global market.

words.definitionEn: a covering for the hand
words.example: Wear a protective glove when handling chemicals.

words.definitionEn: to move or travel to a place
words.example: I go to work by bus.

words.definitionEn: something you aim to achieve
words.example: Our goal is to reduce defects.

words.definitionEn: a being worshipped in a religion
words.definitionTh: พระเจ้า / เทพเจ้า
words.example: The temple was built for a god.

words.definitionEn: a valuable yellow metal; made of or coloured like gold
words.definitionTh: ทอง / สีทอง
words.example: The ring is made of gold.

words.definitionEn: a game played by hitting a small ball into holes
words.example: They played golf on Sunday.

words.definitionEn: of high quality or morally right
words.definitionTh: ดี / ความดี
words.example: The product is in good condition.

words.definitionEn: used when leaving someone
words.example: She said goodbye and left.

words.definitionEn: items for sale or transport
words.example: The goods arrived on time.

words.definitionEn: to control or rule a country or organization
words.definitionTh: ปกครอง / ควบคุม
words.example: The policy governs how data is stored.

words.definitionEn: the group of people who control a country
words.example: The government announced a new policy.

words.definitionEn: to take hold of something quickly
words.example: Grab the handle firmly.

words.definitionEn: a level or mark; to assess and give a mark
words.definitionTh: เกรด / ให้คะแนน
words.example: The material meets the required grade.

words.definitionEn: slowly over a period of time
words.example: The temperature gradually increased.

words.definitionEn: a person who completed a course; to complete a course
words.definitionTh: บัณฑิต / สำเร็จการศึกษา
words.example: She graduated from university last year.

words.definitionEn: a seed of crops such as rice or wheat
words.definitionTh: เมล็ดธัญพืช
words.example: Rice is an important grain.

words.definitionEn: impressive, large, or important
words.example: The hotel has a grand entrance.

words.definitionEn: the father of your mother or father
words.example: My grandfather lives in the countryside.

words.definitionEn: the mother of your mother or father
words.example: Her grandmother taught her to cook.

words.definitionEn: a grandfather or grandmother
words.definitionTh: ปู่ย่าตายาย
words.example: Each grandparent received an invitation.

words.definitionEn: to give or allow officially; money given for a purpose
words.definitionTh: อนุมัติ / เงินสนับสนุน
words.example: The organization granted funding to the project.

words.definitionEn: a common green plant covering the ground
words.example: The grass is wet after the rain.

words.definitionEn: feeling thankful
words.definitionTh: รู้สึกขอบคุณ
words.example: We are grateful for your support.

words.definitionEn: very good, important, or large
words.definitionTh: ยอดเยี่ยม / ยิ่งใหญ่
words.example: The team made great progress.

words.definitionEn: the colour of grass
words.example: The indicator light is green.

words.definitionEn: to welcome or say hello to someone
words.example: She greeted the visitors warmly.

words.definitionEn: a colour between black and white
words.example: The sky was grey.

words.definitionEn: the surface of the earth
words.example: The box fell to the ground.

words.definitionEn: a number of people or things together; to arrange together
words.definitionTh: กลุ่ม / จัดกลุ่ม
words.example: Divide the items into three groups.

words.definitionEn: to increase in size or develop
words.example: The business continues to grow.

words.definitionEn: the process of increasing or developing
words.example: The company reported strong growth.

words.definitionEn: to promise that something will happen; a formal promise
words.definitionTh: รับประกัน / การรับประกัน
words.example: The supplier guarantees product quality.

words.definitionEn: a person who protects; to protect
words.definitionTh: ยาม / ป้องกัน
words.example: The machine guard prevents contact with moving parts.

words.definitionEn: to answer without being certain; an uncertain answer
words.definitionTh: เดา / การคาดเดา
words.example: Can you guess the correct answer?

words.definitionEn: a person invited to visit or stay
words.example: The hotel welcomed each guest.

words.definitionEn: a person or document that gives direction; to direct
words.definitionTh: คู่มือ / นำทาง
words.example: Use this guide to install the software.

words.definitionEn: responsible for doing something wrong
words.example: The court found him guilty.
